title: Current Account Fees
text: A standard current account has a monthly fee of 4 euros. The fee is waived for customers under 30 years old.

title: Credit Card Late Payment
text: If a customer misses a credit card payment, a late fee may be applied and the event can affect the customer's credit profile.

title: Personal Loan Requirements
text: Personal loan applications require proof of income, identity verification, and an affordability assessment based on existing debt and income.

title: Fraud Alert Process
text: Suspicious transactions can trigger a fraud alert. The customer may be contacted to confirm whether the transaction is legitimate.
